personal.preferred_title: Senior Infrastructure Monitoring / Observability Platform Engineer

summary: Senior Infrastructure Monitoring and Observability Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across APM platforms, telemetry analytics, infrastructure monitoring, capacity forecasting, Python automation, SQL/Oracle reporting, runbooks, incident support, and regulated financial-services production environments. Deep background with Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, CA APM/Introscope, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, Linux/Windows monitoring, dashboards, alerting, root-cause analysis, and operational reporting. Strong fit for enterprise monitoring modernization roles that need telemetry quality, noise reduction, onboarding patterns, production reliability, stakeholder alignment, and practical AIOps adoption.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported telemetry analytics pipelines that ingested operational data from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints into curated datasets for monitoring, capacity planning, forecasting, and executive reporting.
Integrated BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM/Wily, AppDynamics, and infrastructure telemetry into unified reporting layers used by engineering, operations, and leadership teams.

Analyzed performance and capacity data to identify infrastructure hotspots, anomalies, underutilized systems, signal-quality gaps, and operational risks across regulated banking technology environments.
Developed Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented automation for telemetry extraction, validation, reconciliation, exception handling, recurring reporting, and production support workflows.

Created dashboards, operational reports, alerting inputs, runbooks, data dictionaries, metadata-style documentation, and stakeholder narratives to support incident review, troubleshooting, and operational decision-making.
Troubleshot missing, inconsistent, or delayed telemetry by tracing source feeds, transformation logic, database behavior, reporting defects, and downstream consumer expectations.
Built forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to identify capacity bottlenecks months ahead and support proactive infrastructure planning and remediation.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, operations, and management teams to explain risks, recommend corrective actions, and improve monitoring and support processes.
Applied regulated-enterprise practices around access controls, auditability, documentation, secure data handling, incident support, and production reliability.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, improving visibility into web, mobile, and service performance.
Implemented End User Monitoring and end-to-end transaction tracing to expose user-experience issues, application dependencies, and production bottlenecks.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security while maintaining production monitoring continuity and avoiding monitoring regressions.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load-test behavior with APM telemetry and support performance engineering decisions.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance telemetry to identify trends, anomalies, and optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Maintained monitoring documentation and supported troubleshooting across application, infrastructure, and operations teams.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a regulated financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, management modules, and reporting standards adopted across enterprise monitoring environments.
Built Perl/Korn Shell and SQL-driven extraction scripts that automated recurring telemetry reporting and replaced manual weekly exports.
Partnered with J2EE/WebLogic, middleware, database, and operations teams to diagnose bottlenecks using APM telemetry, transaction traces, and production evidence.
Delivered monitoring onboarding guidance, operational documentation, technical training, and knowledge-sharing materials for application and support teams.
Supported monitoring standards, onboarding patterns, and operational procedures across large application estates.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, thread contention, JDBC constraints, heap pressure, CPU usage, and garbage-collection risks.
Installed and configured JMX monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts for real-time visibility during performance tests.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and release-readiness evidence used by engineering teams.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Monitoring / Observability: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM / Introscope, CA CEM, CA ADA, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, AppDynamics, JMX Monitoring, EUM/RUM, transaction tracing, synthetic monitoring
skills.Telemetry Platform Operations: Metrics/logs/events/traces concepts, telemetry collection, platform onboarding patterns, dashboard baselines, alerting standards, metadata/runbook documentation, signal-quality improvement, noise-reduction concepts
skills.Infrastructure: Linux/Unix, Windows fundamentals, webserver/middleware/database monitoring, compute/network/storage concepts, hybrid infrastructure operations, enterprise monitoring estates, lifecycle/upgrade support
skills.Automation & Scripting: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, Bash concepts, Pandas, PySpark, telemetry extraction, validation, reconciliation, report automation, exception handling
skills.Databases: Oracle, Oracle RAC, SQL Server concepts, Cassandra concepts, relational data analysis, query tuning, reporting tables, time-series retention structures, database-adjacent performance analysis
skills.Incident / Reliability: Incident triage, root-cause analysis, corrective/preventive action support, operational readiness, runbooks, production health, availability/performance monitoring, MTTR reduction concepts
skills.AIOps / Analytics: Capacity forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, anomaly detection concepts, event correlation concepts, probable root-cause concepts, guided remediation awareness, infrastructure risk analysis
skills.Cloud / DevOps Adjacent: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, Git/GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Terraform awareness, Ansible awareness, Kubernetes/EKS awareness
skills.Tools Adjacent: Splunk concepts, Grafana concepts, Prometheus concepts, OpenTelemetry concepts, Netcool/Tivoli/Instana awareness, Elastic/OpenSearch concepts
skills.Financial Services: Regulated banking environments, audit-driven operations, access-control awareness, secure data handling, production reliability, compliance-minded documentation
skills.Delivery: Technical documentation, runbooks, stakeholder communication, mentoring, knowledge sharing, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, cross-team collaboration

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a capacity forecasting platform that transformed infrastructure telemetry into curated datasets, Prophet/scikit-learn forecasts, capacity-risk indicators, dashboards, and stakeholder reports for proactive resource planning.

projects.name: Observability and APM Telemetry Analytics
projects.description: Built and supported monitoring dashboards, telemetry extraction scripts, transaction tracing workflows, alert thresholds, and operational reports across Dynatrace, CA APM, BMC TrueSight, and AppDynamics environments.

projects.name: AI-Assisted Monitoring / Data Automation Workflow
projects.description: Built Python automation patterns using structured JSON artifacts, validation gates, LLM assistance, semantic similarity, and repeatable workflows, reinforcing disciplined automation and quality-control patterns useful for observability operations.
